commands.review_summary:
The PR centralizes runtime-aware OpenAI-to-Codex context-provider resolution and applies the Codex context window to embedded runs, compaction, manual `/compact`, directive persistence, `/status`, regression tests, and changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main can preserve stale selected-provider context limits in manual `/compact` output and the non-fallback `/status` path. The PR also includes live after-fix logs from a real gateway session showing the corrected 258k budget.
